column1: # ci-local-tools.tsv — fleet tool registry for the local-CI findings harness.
# One row per findings-producing CI tool. Drives two things:
#   1. Lane-B dispatch (ci-local-laneB.sh runs lane=B tools by their own CLI,
#      repo's workflows reference" against "tools the local run accounted for",
#      so no CI tool fails silently).
#   tool             canonical tool name (also the SARIF/output basename)
#   lane             A      = act runs it (Lane A; SARIF captured/aggregated)
#                    B      = direct-CLI/container (Lane B; act can't run it)
#                    cannot = no faithful local run exists (record loud + reason)
#                             skipped by the findings coverage report.
#   workflow_pattern egrep pattern matched against .github/workflows/*.yml to
#                    decide "this tool is in THIS repo's CI". Matches the
#                    reusable-workflow filename or action ref — bare tool names
#                    do NOT appear in callers (the fleet calls
#                    ffreis-workflows-*/...@SHA), so key on the stable ref.
#   probe            space-separated paths; the tool is locally-applicable if
#                    ANY exists (used by Lane-B dispatch). "-" = always.
#   reason           why a lane=cannot tool has no local equivalent, or the
#                    note shown when a lane=B tool's binary/backend is absent.
# Lint/fmt/test/build/coverage/mutation jobs are intentionally absent: act runs
# them and the job classifier already catches them loudly. This registry tracks
# the security/quality scanners — the ones that fail silently.

column5: codeql CLI not installed (run `gh extension install github/gh-codeql` or install the CodeQL CLI bundle)
local SonarQube not reachable (the harness starts one from .mcp.json; see --sonar-cloud for the SonarCloud path)
measures repo settings via the GitHub API — no local code-scan equivalent
needs SNYK_TOKEN + the Snyk SaaS backend
needs the Anthropic API and PR context
GitHub-only API that diffs a PR's dependency manifest
build/test/fmt gate — no findings to capture
image build/sign/sbom — not a findings scanner
